name: goalos-agijobmanager-ascension

scripts.test: python3 tools/verify.py && node tests/operator-parity.test.mjs && node tests/sovereign-machine-economy.test.mjs && node tests/final-assurance-kernel.test.mjs && node tests/legal-shield.test.mjs && node tests/token-boundary.test.mjs
scripts.test:strict: npm test && npm run assurance && npm run factual && npm run build && npm run legal && npm run token-boundary
scripts.test:final: npm run preflight && npm test && npm run assurance && npm run assurance:final && npm run legal && npm run token-boundary && npm run factual:mainnet && npm run build && npm run assurance:final && npm run legal && npm run token-boundary && npm run pathspec-proof
scripts.test:zero-network: node tools/no-registry-preflight.mjs && node tools/pathspec-proof-kernel.mjs && python3 tools/verify.py && node tests/operator-parity.test.mjs && node tests/sovereign-machine-economy.test.mjs && node tests/final-assurance-kernel.test.mjs && node tests/legal-shield.test.mjs && node tests/token-boundary.test.mjs && npm run assurance && npm run assurance:final && npm run legal && npm run token-boundary

description: GoalOS AGIJobManager Ascension static site with pathspec-proof, zero-registry deterministic publication, public proof surfaces, legal/data-zero boundary, AGIALPHA token market boundary, and gated Expert Mainnet Console.
